subtitle: A treeless white moonscape on the north coast of Milos, where wind and sea have eroded soft volcanic rock into bare lunar curves.
spike_statement: Wind off the Aegean and waves driven by the north winds have eroded Milos's pale volcanic tuff into a bare, treeless lunar landscape with no soil and no shade.

levers.photo_tone: bone-white volcanic rock against deep Aegean blue, hard noon light with no warm note and no green
